subject: Project pulse: salmon execution in Melbourne | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-5725
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Melbourne. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-5725. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: urban-watch, quality.
